LightningComponentBundle.description: Modularized Term Builder workspace tile: the scoped line grid for the selected Term (route/requirement attributes + fares) and the Add Fare Class bar. Syncs with the Negotiation Context and Terms Rail tiles over the DLM Term Builder message channel.

property.name: headingLabel
property.label: Heading Label
property.description: Title shown on the workspace card. Leave blank to use the default 'Term Workspace'.

property.name: attributeCodes
property.label: Attribute Codes (CSV)
property.description: Comma-separated route/requirement attribute codes shown in each line's inline attribute picker.

property.name: hideGroupColumn
property.label: Hide Group Column
property.description: Hide the grid's leading Group column (recommended for the single-Term scoped view).

property.name: showAddFareClass
property.label: Show Add Fare Class
property.description: Show the Add Fare Class bar below the grid. Turn off for a fare-locked, edit-only workspace.
